results.title: John Milton Odell Textile Manufacturing Company – William ...
results.snippet: The company was based in North Carolina and included textile mills in Concord and Bynum. Under his management, Odell brought the Bynum mill from the brink of bankruptcy to the highest echelon of commercial success and played a crucial role in bringing wealth and prosperity to Concord , North Carolina.
